title: validate_email_password_authentication_flow
description: Test the email/password authentication endpoint POST /api/auth/login to ensure users can successfully log in with valid credentials and receive appropriate error messages for invalid credentials.

title: verify_dashboard_data_retrieval
description: Test the GET /api/trades and GET /api/user-data endpoints to confirm authenticated users can retrieve trade data and user-specific data for dashboard analytics and widgets.

title: test_trade_data_import_synchronization
description: Test the POST /api/sync endpoint to verify users can trigger trade import and synchronization jobs, handle success confirmations, and properly display error notifications on failure.

title: validate_teams_dashboard_access_and_data
description: Test the GET /api/teams/:slug endpoint to ensure authenticated team members can access team dashboard data and non-members receive access denied responses.

title: verify_health_endpoint_operational_signals
description: Test GET /api/health to validate service availability response shape, status signaling, and non-sensitive diagnostics fields.

title: validate_checkout_endpoints_post_only_enforcement
description: Test /api/whop/checkout and /api/whop/checkout-team to confirm GET requests return 405 with Allow: POST and POST enforces expected security checks.

title: verify_cron_endpoints_require_service_auth
description: Test cron routes such as /api/cron, /api/cron/investing, and /api/cron/compute-trade-data to verify unauthorized requests are rejected and authorized requests follow expected behavior.

title: validate_unsubscribe_and_email_security_flows
description: Test /api/email/unsubscribe and /api/email/welcome related behavior to ensure signed-token/secret checks are enforced and invalid requests fail closed.
